codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves all previously reported issues from panora-swap-routing. Quotes now use GET /swap/quote, swap execution remains on POST /swap, route text now parses Panora route metadata when present (with fallback), exchange rate is per-unit, and USD equivalent uses Panora's toTokenAmountUSD field with fallback.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata still references frontend-ui-worker while worker runtime used frontend-worker due runtime skill availability mismatch.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json (fix-panora-quote-and-routing.skillName = frontend-ui-worker) vs fix handoff/transcript for session 822eaeb5-dc42-45bc-9d1b-5b080184411d showing fallback invocation of frontend-worker.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS guidance for Panora authentication appears stale/incorrect; it states no API key is needed, but live Panora quote requests return 401 without x-api-key.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md says 'No API key needed for basic usage'. Direct GET https://api.panora.exchange/swap/quote without key returned {"statusCode":401,"message":"API key is required"} during this review.

summary: Fix review passed: both prior blocking issues and both prior non-blocking display correctness issues were addressed in commit fa3c7bb, with no new blocking regressions found.
